response.step_by_step_log:
1. The video is identified as part of the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026'.
2. The final performance, shown starting at 03:57.000, is identified as 'Our Bright Parade' based on the setlist and visual/audio cues.
3. Searched for 'Our Bright Parade hololive lyrics'. Found the lyrics on Lyrical Nonsense.
4. The song 'Our Bright Parade' is composed and written by Shota Horie.
5. The performance is by the 'Hololive IDOL PROJECT'.
6. Full lyrics were obtained and formatted for the JSON.
response.global_summary: A festive countdown concert featuring numerous Hololive talents performing a variety of original songs. The video includes a full performance of 'Our Bright Parade' in the final scene, followed by credits listing the performers and setlist.

scenes.description: The video features a countdown concert from 2025 to 2026. The video ends with the song 'Our Bright Parade', followed by credits showing the performers and the setlist, including 'Our Bright Parade'. No specific scene break before the song.
Performance of 'Our Bright Parade' by various Hololive talents. Text indicates 'Our Bright Parade'. Lyrics found online for the song composed by Shota Horie.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Parade, Parade, Parade!
輝くんだよ 呼び合う声を 合図に
Parade, Parade, Parade!
探しにゆく スタートは 何度だって

ただ 独り言を綴った
ただ 始まりたくて 走った
遠く 暗がりに灯った
それは 眩し過ぎた名前
それは 優し過ぎる思い出もっと
近づけと 手を伸ばした
思いがけず 結び合った
ほら 今
迷子は
“僕等” になった

Parade, Parade, Parade!
輝くんだよ
悔しさも 愛しさも 連れておいで
風、夢、羽
飛び立てるさ
ささやかな祈りは 光
終わりなき 兆し
君を 見つけたこと
胸を張れるよ
Our Bright Parade, Parade!

まだ 頼りない予感を
歌おう 恥ずかしくなんて ないよ
誰も解けない イマジナリー
いつかまた逢える おまじない
あの日ゼロに始まった ストーリー
数え切れない 言の葉
数えるような 想いじゃないさ
ほら 今
“僕等”を
一つと呼ぼう

Parade, Parade, Parade!
美しいんだよ
許し合える刹那
夜は きらめく
雨、晴れ、カレイド
またとない空
相応しい旅路とは
君と在る
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Parade, Parade, Parade! 
It shines, triggered by our voices calling each other
Parade, Parade, Parade!
Searching, the start is every time
Just wrote a monologue
Just wanted to start, so I ran
Lit up far away in the darkness
That was a name too dazzling
That was a memory too gentle
Reached out my hand, hoping it would get closer
Unexpectedly, we were tied together
Look, now
The lost child
Became 'Us'
Parade, Parade, Parade!
It shines
Bring along the regrets and the love
Wind, dream, feather
We can fly
A small prayer is light
Endless omen
That I found you
I can hold my head high
Our Bright Parade, Parade!
Still, an uncertain premonition
Let's sing, there's nothing to be ashamed of
An imaginary that no one can solve
A good luck charm that we can meet again someday
The story that started at zero that day
Countless words
It's not a feeling like counting
Look, now
'Us'
Let's call it one
Parade, Parade, Parade!
It's beautiful
The moment we can forgive each other
The night sparkles
Rain, sun, kaleidoscope
A sky like no other
The appropriate journey
Exists with you
